title: bromus macrantherus
intro: Bromus macrantherus, also known as the large-flowered brome or mountain brome, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bromus macrantherus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant, making it useful for treating conditions such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
